it took a while until I finally understood what dota lanes are called
but since when you go sidelane depending on the team side you are on
the "ADC"s in dota play vs the "Top lane", vice versa on the other side
and the guys the "Bot lane" in league plays vs
is like playing against the TOP lane type of champ +  a kind of support laner too
one of the supps is called "HARD SUPP" which literally gets no gold at all compared to everyone else
its the guy stuck building max utility + wards
and learned they name all of these "off lane" positions different numbers from 1 to 5
and they call it in order of who gets to need most gold to function properly
Offlane Carry (the guy who goes vs the ADC lane in the opposide team) is pos 3
and hard support on the botlane is pos 5
at least I think im correct?
so when you say I play "Samira in pos 3" it means you play samira in the top lane (if you are blue side), or bottom lane (red side) in leagues terms
they switch lanes depending on what team they are
and bot lane basically always plays vs a "top lane"
